hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */projects/*/film.json) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"film.json 是受管真相源，直写会绕过乐观锁/ledger 留痕/门控保护。请改用 film-ir/.venv/bin/kuleshov-ir patch。确属例外（如修复坏 JSON）可由用户放行。"}}';; */styles/*/contract.json) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"风格合同生产期内对生产 agent 只读。带宽内调整走 ir patch 写 meta.contract_amendments；合同本身的修改属风格包进化，按 styles/_iteration.md 规程在专门会话做，可由用户放行。"}}';; esac; }
hooks.statusMessage: film.json / 风格合同直写拦截检查
